description:
Mario Kart Wii is a racing game for the Nintendo Wii. Race through cups across
multiple engine classes, unlocking characters, vehicles, and new cups along the way.

v0.0.1.description:
## First Official Release!
This release includes:
- An exe build for windows users.
- Gecko Code based vanilla unlock blocking over the old savestate based vanilla blocking.
- A revamped tracker window.
- Stabilisation Updates.

*Linux users, download the source code here to run the client.*

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.1-pre.2...v0.0.1
v0.0.1.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.0.1

v0.0.1-pre.0.description:
# The first pre-release!
Just an initial release so you guys can start playing :)

For the client just download the source code, that has everything you need. 

I do want to note that this version is practically a public playtest, it will break. Please read the install instructions in the [README.md](https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/blob/main/README.md) as they are quite particular.

## What is available in this pre-release?
- Fully completable from start to finish.
- Character, Cup, Vehicle and Kart/Bike Swap unlocks.
- Grand Prix ranking location checks (per CC).
- Vanilla unlock blocking (kinda, using savestates).
- Complete [x] amount of cups on [y]CC for Goal options.
- Useless, non-functional filler items :D

## What is NOT available in this pre-release (but is planned for the future)?
- Item unlocks
- Proper built in vanilla unlock blocking
- Functional, functional filler items
- Traps
- Individual race location checks
- Time trials location checks

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/commits/v0.0.1-pre.0
v0.0.1-pre.0.title: MKWii AP Pre-Release Version 0.0.1

v0.0.2.description:
## Release Version 0.0.2
This release is focussed on a plethora of QoL improvements as well as stabilisation improvements.

### Changelog
- Moved away from gecko code based vanilla item blocking to DME based vanilla item blocking.
- Improved hooking stabilisation and consistency.
- Added the option to run Dolphin manually.
- Made the savefile selection manual as the auto detection was causing a lot of issues and was not working well.

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.1...v0.0.2
v0.0.2.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.0.2

v0.0.2-h1.description:
## Release Version 0.0.2 "Hotfix" 1
Doesn't really fix anything, but rather adds an optional reporting/logging feature to help with future debugging.
To **enable** logging add `"reporting": true` to `mkwii_ap_config.json`, if left out of config or set to `false` reporting will be **disabled**.
Reports will be saved to `report.log`.

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.2...v0.0.2-h1
v0.0.2-h1.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.0.2 "Hotfix" 1

v0.1.0.description:
## Release Version 0.1.0
Big Update!! Let me first touch on how I will be naming these updates:
- Hotfixes: 0.0.0-h*x* update.
- Small update with minor features: 0.0.*x* update.
- Big update with major new features: 0.*x*.0 update.
- Full "out of beta release" or full rewrites: *x*.0.0 update.

### Now! To the changes and Additions:
- Added individual race checks.
- Added item pool unlocks.
- Changed filler items to be actually function and send items to the player's item slot.
- Fixed all generation issues of (now deleted) _v0.0.2 hotfix 2_.
- Fixed all check spawning issues of (now deleted) _v0.0.2 hotfix 2_.

### Things that will be added as a small update soon (so don't ask me about it!):
- Tracker update to show unlocked items and individual race check progress.
- Probably something else that im forgetting rn lol

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**For all users,  the release needs a new version of the apworld to function, your old apworld will no longer work.**

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.2-h2...v0.1.0
v0.1.0.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.1.0

v0.1.1.description:
## Release Version 0.1.1
This version has some bugfixes but is mostly focussed on the new and improved tracker :) .

### Changelog:
- Added tracker new tabs for track first place checks and item unlocks.
- Made tracker a standalone application.
- Added option for tracker auto launch in `mkwii_ap_config.json`.
- Tracker now scales based on window size.
- Removed TKinter as a dependency by swapping fully to kivy. (thanks [MrRedstone54](https://github.com/MrRedstone54) :D )
- Fixed spammability through item replacer.
- Fixed bug in completion prevention by other people completing their game.

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.1...v0.1.1
v0.1.1.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.1.1

v0.1.1-h2.description:
## Hotfix 2 for Release Version 0.1.1
Fixed a mirror mode apworld generation issue that I had forgotten existed lol. (thanks bonzorio for reminding me and squirrel107 for the initial report).

## Changelog:
- Added extra generation check for mirror cup generation, so it wont generate in a locked mirror cup.
- Some victory condition check clean up and improvements regarding mirror mode.

**TO RUN THIS VERSION OR ANY OTHER VERSIONS YOU NEED TO UPDATE BOTH CLIENT AND APWORLD!**

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.1.1-h1...v0.1.1-h2

v0.1.1-h3.description:
## Hotfix 3 for Release Version 0.1.1
People were having some issues with location checks and game completion, these have been fixed now. All client side, **no apworld update required (if you have hotfix 2).**

### Changelog:
- Made earlier fail save in apworld for goal_difficulty and enabled_cup_check_tiers miss-matches actually functional in the client, location checks and goal completions should be fully working.
- Fixed location checks not sending when removing a lower cup check tier from enabled_cup_check_tiers, while keeping higher ones.

**REQUIRES THE APWORLD OF 0.1.1-h2 OR HIGHER!**

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.1.1-h2...v0.1.1-h3
v0.1.1-h3.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.1.1 Hotfix 3

v0.2.0.description:
## Release Version 0.2.0: Base Track Locking/Unlocks!
Yup that's it, after quite a while I crunched a big update out today, it was worth it though. I have one of the most requested features added, **base cup/track unlocks!** there is even more exiting stuff in this update, such as a clear condition rework and several bug fixes.

### How it works
**Let me explain how it works**, as it is not perfect yet. I can't visually and functionally block base unlocked cups from being started without patching the rom (which I want to try to avoid as long as possible). So if you try to start a cup you haven't unlocked yet, you'll be sent to a cup in the same Engine Class (cc/mirror) that you DO have unlocked, the cup you're sent to is always the one that has the most possible check completions still available. If there is no cup unlocked in the selected Engine Class you will be sent to the cup, however you will not be able to complete laps and thus will not be able to complete the race. For VS Race, you have the tracks unlocked for the cup (per cc) you have unlocked, trying to launch a VS Race will send you into the race without being able to complete laps.
When starting an Archipelago of this game you will by default start with 2 unlocked cups, I heavily recommend using the included tracker to see this, the cups page will now also show what cups are unlocked. One cup will be in 50cc and the other 100cc so you need to use both karts and bikes, if you have either 50cc or/and 100cc disabled, your 2 cups will be unlocked for the lowest available Engine Class.

### Changelog:
- Added base cup/track unlocks.
- Added cup unlock tracking in cups page in tracker.
- Reworked clear condition/completion system: each goal cup will now award a 'Victory Trophy' when you have as many Victory Trophies as assigned in your YAML you will complete your AP.
- Added option to hide your AP ip and port in the tracker.
- Removed Dolphin Auto Launch as it was causing too many issues.

**REQUIRES A NEW APWORLD, ANY PREVIOUS APWORLD VERSION WILL NOT WORK!**

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.1.1-h3...v0.2.0
v0.2.0.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.2.0
